stemHtml: In pre-flight preparations, it becomes evident that the altitude alerting system on the aircraft is inoperative. No engineering support is available at the airport. As a consequence of this failure, which operational restrictions are now applicable?

options.a: GPS altitude must be available as a back-up to the barometric altimeters.
options.b: The flight must be conducted outside of RVSM airspace.
options.d: The aeroplane is unable to perform an autoland.
